videos.title: Azure Beastbinder Dominates Post Rotation
videos.description:
Do you love Azure Beastbinder? Well, its the perfect card in the current standard! It does it all for Dimir. Check this out if you're looking for a competitive deck.

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-azure-beastbinder-dominates-post-rotation
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7276602#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/JOHai
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/N73fW

videos.title: Avatar Brings Lessons, Allies and a Ton of Bending to MTG  Avatar the Last Airbender Spoilers
videos.description:
Avatar: the Last Airbender x Magic: the Gathering doesn't release until November,  but we got a bunch of early spoilers today and they look awesome!

Need Avatar Cards? https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

Need more spoilers? https://www.mtgpreviews.com
